mentions.note: Down almost 100 points from its November highs despite Nvidia's Jensen Huang praising it as the secure foundation of the AI buildout; a rare, aggressive buying opportunity.

Agentic security operations driving secular demand tailwind; enterprise customers want to deploy AI faster but security is bottleneck. Proprietary data from 176+ countries unmatched advantage. Own position.

Cybersecurity turbocharged by AI (more vulnerabilities created for hackers); up 6% today, off highs but fundamentally positioned to benefit.
